scratchpads.name: Scratchpad
scratchpads.content:
# Nexus Weekly Plan (Apr 6-9, 2026)

## Status: v1.4 | 25% weekly fuel | ~8 sessions until Thursday reset

## This Week's Priorities (Overseer + Captain agreed)

### 1. Knowledge Graph for Ledger (HIGH IMPACT)
- Evolve flat decision index into a relationship graph
- Decisions link to related decisions (bidirectional)
- Schema: { from_id, to_id, relationship_type }
- Types: 'led_to', 'replaced', 'depends_on', 'contradicts'
- Enables: 'What decisions led to the current architecture?'
- Overseer can traverse the graph for deeper analysis
- **Scope: 1 medium session**

### 2. TypeScript Migration Start (FOUNDATION)
- tsconfig.json for server (strict)
- Convert store.js ? store.ts first (most critical file)
- Convert routes one by one (each is independent)
- Don't boil the ocean -- incremental, test as you go
- **Scope: 2-3 small sessions**

### 3. Git Workflow Automation (SAFETY)
- nexus commit-all: commit pending changes across fleet
- nexus sync: fetch all remotes, show ahead/behind
- Auto-stash before risky operations
- Dashboard button for fleet-wide git status
- **Scope: 1 small session**

### 4. Dashboard Polish (DAILY USE)
- Fix brief filter (Nexus brief shows Firewall tasks)
- Responsive layout improvements
- Dark/light theme toggle (stretch)
- Loading states for slow Overseer queries
- **Scope: tiny tasks, spread across sessions**

### 5. More Tests (SAFETY NET)
- Route tests (HTTP level)
- Estimator burn rate calculation tests
- Search ranking tests
- Target: 30+ tests before TS migration
- **Scope: 1 small session**

## Fuel Budget
- ~8 sessions � ~50% usable per session = ~4 medium tasks
- Knowledge Graph: 1 medium
- TypeScript start: 1 medium (store.ts + tsconfig)
- Git automation: 1 small
- Tests + polish: 1 small
- Reserve: 1 session for Firewall-Godot work

## NOT This Week
- Dashboard themes (nice-to-have, not urgent)
- Mobile view
- Network mode
- Full TypeScript migration (incremental over weeks)

sessions.summary: Completed v0.2 The Bridge. Session log, search, project health all operational. 5 modules now: Pulse, Missions, Activity, Sessions, Scratchpad.

Completed v0.3 The Lookout. Activity digest with 24h/7d/30d ranges, project ranking bars. Windows toast notifications via PowerShell. Quick Actions panel with Git Summary, Full Health, Archive Done. Toast overlay in dashboard via WebSocket.

Completed v0.4 The Engine Room. Usage tracking with fuel gauge in sidebar (session% + weekly%), auto-alerts at low thresholds. GPU history poller snapshots every 60s with 24h retention. Timeline endpoint ready.
decisions: usage gauge in sidebar not main panel

sessions.summary: Built Nexus from scratch in one session. v0.1: Express+React+Vite scaffold, JSON store, WebSocket, System Pulse with RTX 3070 Ti GPU monitoring, Mission Board kanban, Activity Stream, Scratchpad with CodeMirror 6, global CLI tool (npm link). v0.2 The Bridge: Session Log API (the memory bridge), global search (Ctrl+K), project health cards with heat map. v0.3 The Lookout: activity digest (24h/7d/30d), Windows toast notifications, Quick Actions panel. v0.4 The Engine Room: Claude usage tracking with fuel gauge in sidebar, GPU history poller (60s snapshots). Also: keyboard shortcuts (Ctrl+1-5), drag-and-drop Mission Board, chokidar file watcher, git post-commit hooks. All 9 projects in C:/Projects connected fleet-wide (CLAUDE.md + hooks + file watcher). Personality: The Cartographer -- navigation metaphors, amber+navy theme, calls user Captain. 18 CLI commands. Nexus manages itself (dogfooded).
decisions: JSON file over SQLite (no native deps)

sessions.summary: Phase 3A complete + P3B.0 Interactive Inventory + Adversarial Engine expansion (5 agents). Fixed all NPC data issues from agent findings. Ready for P3B.1 Campaign Manager.
decisions: 7 faction districts for Extropia hub (one per rep network)
7 graduated origin scenarios (5 core + 4 optional scenes each)
Faction resolution system � each mission has 2-3 resolution paths rewarding different factions
Burgundy Agent added as 5th adversarial agent for dialogue tree analysis
Interactive inventory mode with 5 item effect types (heal, buff, set_flag, apply_condition, reveal_info)
Nexus mission board as shared task tracker for adversarial findings
files_touched: src/engine/game_runner.gd (inventory mode, save/load, character sheet, item effects)
modules/*/npcs.json (greeting nodes, combat stats, durability fixes)
scenes/adventure/adventure_hud.gd (module exit flow, return to menu)

sessions.summary: Completed v0.5 The Observatory. Activity Heatmap with 12-week calendar grid, heat-colored cells, hover tooltips, hour-of-day distribution bar chart. Scratchpad split-pane markdown preview with custom Nexus-styled prose (amber headers, code blocks, blockquotes). Snippet library with save/insert/delete, stored in localStorage.
decisions: heatmap on Pulse page between digest and GPU

sessions.summary: Completed v0.6 The Signal Tower. Git fleet command (nexus repos) shows all repos with branch, last commit, dirty/ahead/behind status. Webhook system with inbound (GitHub webhook receiver parsing push/PR/issue/release events) and outbound (configurable Discord/Slack/Teams/JSON targets). LM Studio integration with auto-detection, chat, summarize, and scratchpad assist endpoints. Gemma 4 26B thinking model required reasoning_content extraction workaround. 21 CLI commands now.
decisions: git commands not gh CLI (more portable)

sessions.summary: Completed v0.7 The Overseer. AI project management layer using Gemma 4 26B on local RTX 3070 Ti. Three components: (1) Full fleet strategic analysis -- gathers all tasks, sessions, git state, usage data and asks local LLM for situation/priorities/risks/recommendations. (2) Risk scanner -- instant, no-AI detection of stale repos, uncommitted work, stuck tasks, aging blockers, low fuel. (3) Ask the Overseer -- freeform questions with full workspace context. Dashboard module with analysis panel, Q&A input, and risk sidebar. CLI: nexus overseer, nexus overseer risks, nexus overseer 'question'. Gemma 4 reasoning_content extraction handles thinking model. 24 CLI commands, 8 dashboard modules.
decisions: risk scanner is pure logic no AI

sessions.summary: Pushed to GitHub (kronosderet/Firewall-godot). 24 commits, 17K+ lines, 737 tests, 5-agent adversarial QA. All phases through P3B.0 complete.
decisions: Nexus integrated as shared mission control for adversarial findings
Nexus API uses PATCH not PUT for task updates
Next session: P3B.1 Campaign Manager -> P3B.2 Extropia Hub (7 faction districts)

sessions.summary: Completed v0.8 The Helmsman. Three features: (1) Overseer auto-scan -- periodic risk detection every 5m, broadcasts critical alerts as toasts, stores latest scan for nexus brief. (2) Project Focus -- deep single-project view with git log, branch, tasks, blockers, decisions, sessions, activity count. CLI: nexus focus [project]. (3) Budget Advisor -- analyzes Claude fuel level and suggests appropriately-scoped work in 4 tiers: critical/low/moderate/healthy. CLI: nexus budget. nexus brief now includes risk section. 26 CLI commands total.
decisions: risk scanner is pure logic no AI

sessions.summary: Completed v0.9 The Bridge Console. Web terminal in dashboard (Ctrl+7) with PowerShell backend via WebSocket, quick command buttons (nexus brief/tasks/risks/gpu/repos/budget), auto-scroll, fullscreen toggle. Actionable risk buttons on Overseer -- each risk now has a fix command (Check status, Mark done, View project) that copies to clipboard. Terminal uses child_process.spawn (no node-pty, no native deps). Overseer suggested this feature -- first time the AI directed its own development.
decisions: child_process over node-pty (no C++ build tools needed)

sessions.summary: NEXUS v1.0 THE SENTINEL shipped. Startup initialization sequence with animated 7-point health check (system, database, GPU, AI, git, projects, usage) that runs real diagnostics against all subsystems. Auto-remediation API with 7 whitelisted safe commands (git-status, git-stash, git-diff-stat, git-log, git-fetch, nexus-task-done, nexus-log) executable by the Overseer. Scan endpoint returns risks with actionable fix buttons. Version bumped to 1.0.0 across all package.json files and server banner. Welcome screen now shows animated checklist with live results from each subsystem -- sees RTX 3070 Ti, LM Studio with Gemma 4 26B, 6 repos, 9 projects, fuel levels. 10 versions shipped in one day.
decisions: init endpoint runs all checks in parallel
welcome screen auto-dismisses after checks complete

sessions.summary: v1.0.1 Clock and Calendar. Clock widget on Pulse shows local Czech time, date, work hours remaining. Fuel gauges with burn rate projection (empty at X:XX). Sparkline of fuel history. 7-day calendar strip highlighting today and Thursday weekly reset. /api/clock endpoint returns full timing context. Low fuel -- logging session.
decisions: calendar shows weekly reset day in green

sessions.summary: v1.0.2 bugfixes and cleanup. Fixed WebSocket routing (noServer + upgrade handler) -- resolved reconnection loop and terminal disconnect. Fixed Vite proxy for dual WS paths. Repurposed Captain's Log scratchpad to working scratch area -- nexus note now goes to Session Log tagged 'note' instead of scratchpad. No more duplication. Archived 4 projects (Firewall-Python, resonance-prototype, roulette, hrosi-vyznani). Fleet trimmed to 5 active. Pushed v1.0 to GitHub.
decisions: scratchpad is working area not log
nexus note goes to sessions with note tag

sessions.summary: v1.1 Embedding Search shipped. Semantic search via nomic-embed-text-v1.5 (768-dim vectors) running locally on LM Studio. Endpoints: /api/embed/search (semantic query), /api/embed/reindex (pre-embed corpus), /api/embed/stats. CLI: nexus seek 'query'. Disk-cached embeddings in nexus-embeddings.json. 165 items indexed across sessions/tasks/activity/scratchpads. Cosine similarity ranking. 72% accuracy on targeted queries vs 50% keyword baseline.
decisions: nexus seek for semantic vs nexus find for keyword

sessions.summary: v1.2 Smart Fuel Estimator shipped. Interpolates fuel between reports, calculates burn rates from weighted history, predicts runway (constrained by session/weekly/window), sizes workload into task categories (tiny/small/medium/large/huge). CLI: nexus fuel (full readout), nexus workload (task capacity planner). Correctly identifies weekly fuel as constraint. Burn rates will calibrate with more data points across sessions. Also fixed fuel gauge sync bug -- session timing now persisted to nexus.json.
decisions: weekly fuel identified as tighter constraint

sessions.summary: v1.3 The Ledger shipped. Strategic decision index with 59 entries auto-extracted from session history. Schema: decision, context, project, alternatives, tags. API: /api/ledger (CRUD), /api/ledger/extract (auto-parse sessions). CLI: nexus record (manual), nexus decisions (view). Dashboard module with project grouping, expandable cards, tag filtering. Decisions also indexed in search. 10 dashboard modules, 32 CLI commands.

End of day 1. Nexus v1.3 stable on GitHub. 10 modules, 32 CLI commands, 59 ledger decisions, semantic search, Gemma 4 Overseer, smart fuel estimator. Built 13 versions in one day (v0.1-v1.3). Fleet: 5 active projects, 4 archived. The Overseer directed its own development from v0.7. The Cartographer remembers.

v1.3.1: Ledger integration + first tests. Brief now shows recent Ledger decisions per project. Overseer context includes Ledger (references past decisions when analyzing). First Vitest test suite: 10 tests covering usage tracking (CRUD, sorting, limits), task creation (auto-IDs, defaults), and Ledger (decisions with context/alternatives/projects). All green in 151ms.

v1.4 Hybrid Smart Search. Reciprocal Rank Fusion merges keyword + semantic results. Type-boosted: decisions 1.5x, sessions 1.3x, activity 0.7x. CLI: nexus search. Dot product for speed. Shared embedding cache.

v1.5 Knowledge Graph shipped. Decisions now form a traversable graph with bidirectional edges. 5 relationship types: led_to, replaced, depends_on, contradicts, related. Auto-linker found 129 connections from 59 decisions using temporal chains (sequential in same project), keyword overlap (shared terms), and tag matching (cross-project). Zero orphan nodes. CLI: nexus link (manual), nexus graph (stats + traverse), auto-link API. Store: addEdge, removeEdge, traverse (BFS with depth limit), getGraph. Overseer can now traverse decision chains for deeper analysis.
decisions: auto-link uses text overlap not AI (fast+free)

sessions.summary: v1.5.1 Impact Analysis Engine. Four analysis modes built on the Knowledge Graph: (1) Blast Radius -- traces downstream impact of changing a decision via directed edge traversal, (2) Contradiction Detection -- finds conflicting decisions via superseded edges + keyword opposition pairs, (3) Centrality Analysis -- ranks most foundational decisions by connection count, (4) Structural Holes -- identifies weak cross-project links. CLI: nexus impact blast/contradictions/centrality/holes. 39 CLI commands.
decisions: blast radius follows led_to+depends_on edges only
structural holes analyzes cross-project edge density

usage.note: Session resets 17:00 CET, weekly resets Thursday 21:00 CET
v0.4 timing update, baseline for new session
Fresh session window! 4h52m until reset ~3:00 AM
Night session, Captain is inspired and has fuel to burn

graph_edges.note: Shared terms: nexus, mission, shared, adversarial, findings
